CONTENT.Club career: Krahn made his professional debut for Hamburger SV on the 6 February 2022, replacing David Kinsombi during a 5–0 away 2. Bundesliga win against Darmstadt 98, delivering an assist to Robert Glatzel in the last goal of the game.On 24 June 2024, Krahn signed with 1. FC Saarbrücken in 3. Liga.
CONTENT.International career: Born in Germany, Krahn is of Ghanaian descent. He is a youth international for Germany, having played up to the Germany U17s.

SUMMARY: Elijah Akwasi Krahn (born 24 August 2003) is a German professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for 3. Liga club 1. FC Saarbrücken.
